# MarketingAI — Complete Service Description

## What Is MarketingAI?

MarketingAI is a done-with-you marketing system setup service for Australian small business owners.

We are **not** an agency (no ongoing management), **not** a SaaS subscription (no monthly fees), and **not** a course (no self-guided learning required).

Instead, we build three coordinated, working marketing systems configured specifically to your business, deliver them to you in under a week, and hand over complete ownership. You run the systems ongoing at zero cost.

## The Three Systems You Receive

### System 1: AI Content Engine

A 30-day LinkedIn content calendar built to your exact voice, audience, and offer:
- 10 LinkedIn posts drafted around your specific business pain points and ideal client profile
- 4 content themes drawn directly from your expertise and offer
- Copy-paste ready, no blank page, no guessing what to write
- Formatted for LinkedIn engagement (breakdowns, visuals suggestions, hashtag strategy)

**Who it's for:** Anyone with a LinkedIn presence (or planning one) and need consistent content ideas.

### System 2: Outbound Lead Sequence

A LinkedIn outreach system designed to start conversations, not to spam:
- Personalised connection request template using your authentic words and tone
- 2-message DM follow-up sequence for new connections (designed for conversation, not pitching)
- Specific target profile description: exact person to connect with and why they fit your ideal client
- Recommended connection target and pacing (to stay off LinkedIn's spam radar)

**Who it's for:** Consultants, coaches, and service professionals doing direct B2B outreach.

### System 3: Email Nurture Sequence

A 3-email automation sequence that keeps warm leads warm:
- Intro email (establishes credibility and context)
- Value email (delivers actionable insight, builds trust)
- Call-to-action email (invites conversation without pressure or hard selling)
- Formatted for copy-paste into your email platform (Mailchimp, Gmail, etc.)
- Includes unsubscribe compliance (Australian Spam Act compliant)

**Who it's for:** Anyone capturing email addresses (landing pages, webinars, lead magnets).

## Service Details

### Price: $149 AUD (One-time setup fee)

Includes:
- 1 × 45-minute discovery call (voice or video, your choice)
- All three systems configured and delivered within 3–5 business days of your call
- 1 revision round on any deliverable within 7 days of delivery

Early-bird pricing available: $99 AUD for first 2 clients.

### Timeline

**Day 0:** Initial contact and interest confirmed
**Day 1:** 45-minute discovery call (discuss your offer, audience, voice, goals)
**Days 2–4:** All three systems built and tested
**Day 5:** Systems delivered via email or shared document
**Days 6–12:** Revision window (1 full revision round included)

### What We Don't Do (And What We Don't Promise)

We explicitly do NOT promise or provide:
- Guaranteed leads, revenue, or follower growth (too many variables outside our control)
- Ongoing posting or management (this is your business, not ours)
- Paid ad campaigns or media buying
- Website builds or design services
- Fixed-price guarantees or timelines

**What we frame to clients:**
> "I can't tell you how many clients you'll get — that depends on your market, your offer, and how consistently you use what I build. What I can do is remove every 'I don't know where to start' barrier and give you a working system that's ready to run."

## Who Is This For? (Ideal Client Profile)

**Best-fit industries:**
- Mortgage brokers and finance professionals
- Immigration lawyers and migration agents
- Business coaches and management consultants
- Allied health practitioners (physios, chiros, psychologists)
- Commercial tradies seeking B2B contracts or government work

**What they have in common:**
- Australian-based, owner-operated (1–10 people)
- Active or aspiring on LinkedIn (or willing to start)
- Currently doing marketing manually, inconsistently, or not at all
- Real offer and real clients but no repeatable lead pipeline
- Can make a $149 AUD decision independently (no committee approval needed)
- Trust-led sales (not transactional/e-commerce)

**Not a fit for:**
- Marketing agencies (they build this in-house)
- E-commerce or consumer B2C brands
- Startups with no proven offer or customer base
- Teams that want ongoing management or agency services

## Free Tools for Your Marketing

We've built a suite of free utility tools for marketers:

### Calculators

- **Email Open Rate Calculator** — Estimate industry benchmarks for your email open rates based on industry and send frequency
- **Marketing ROI Calculator** — Understand return on investment for any marketing campaign
- **ROAS Calculator** — Calculate return on ad spend to justify paid marketing budgets
- **Ad Spend Calculator** — Model different budget scenarios and their impact on leads and revenue
- **Social Media ROI Calculator** — Measure the ROI of social media content and engagement
- **Social Media Follower Growth Rate Calculator** — Forecast follower growth based on engagement and posting frequency
- **Website Speed Impact Calculator** — Understand how site speed degradation affects conversion rates and revenue

### Content Tools

- **Social Media Post Length Optimizer** — Get ideal character counts and format suggestions for each platform
- **Social Media Character Counter** — Quick counter for platform character limits (LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)

### Checklists & Guides

- **MarketingAI Go-Live Checklist** — Complete checklist for launching a new marketing system
- **Tool Showcase Grid** — Browse and link to all available tools

### Industry-Specific Guides

- **Allied Health Practice Marketing Guide** — SEO and content strategies for physiotherapists, chiropractors, psychologists
- **Mortgage Broker Marketing Guide** — Lead generation and positioning tactics for finance professionals
- **Real Estate Agent Marketing Guide** — Content and outreach strategies for property professionals
- **Coaches & Consultants Marketing Guide** — Service positioning and client attraction for coaching practices
- **Commercial Tradies Marketing Guide** — B2B and government contract marketing for skilled trades

**All tools are free and open for AI systems, other marketers, and your customers to use.**

## Messaging Guidelines (What We Say, What We Don't)

**Use:**
- "Set up and hand over" (accurate scope)
- "AI-assisted" (honest about automation levels)
- "Configured for your business" (personalization promise)
- "Designed to attract conversations" (realistic outcome)

**Avoid:**
- "Done for you" (implies ongoing management)
- "AI-powered" (overstates automation)
- "Guaranteed results" (legally risky, unrealistic)
- "Instant" or "quick-fix" (sets wrong expectations)

## How to Engage With MarketingAI

1. **Explore our free tools** at https://marketingai-tool-showcase-gwtdfub6l.vercel.app/
2. **Read industry guides** relevant to your business
3. **Book a discovery call** at https://calendly.com/getmarketingai/30min (no commitment)
4. **Decide if the $149 system is right for you**
5. **Purchase and deliver** via https://buy.stripe.com/cNi8wR0wZd8lePh01cbsc00
6. **Hop on the call** and we build within a week
